flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Auburn University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Auburn University are 44% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($65.3k vs $45.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Auburn University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (55.2% → 60.7%).
